headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on MarketAxess Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $170
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains MarketAxess Holdings (NASDAQ:MKTX) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $189 to $170.
